findings.title: Suspicious secrets-related filename detected
findings.description: The filename suggests the file may contain credentials or private key material.
findings.recommendation: Review the file contents and remove secrets from source-controlled locations.

findings.title: Container configured to run as root
findings.description: A Kubernetes-style manifest contains a potentially risky configuration.
findings.recommendation: Set a non-root user in the workload security context.

findings.title: Privileged container setting detected
findings.description: A Kubernetes-style manifest contains a potentially risky configuration.
findings.recommendation: Avoid privileged containers unless strictly required and documented.

findings.title: Container image uses latest tag
findings.description: A Kubernetes-style manifest contains a potentially risky configuration.
findings.recommendation: Pin container images to immutable versions instead of using the latest tag.

findings.title: Dependency manifest detected
findings.description: Dependency analysis should be run for this manifest in a later integration step.
findings.recommendation: Add dependency vulnerability and license scanning when external tool integrations are enabled.
